# Security Policy

We take security issues seriously. If you discover a vulnerability in AnomotionJS, please report it following the guidelines below.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest active release versions of the packages receive security patches.

| Version | Supported |
| :--- | :--- |
| 1.0.x | :white_check_mark: Yes |
| < 1.0.0 | :x: No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities. Instead, send reports privately via email to:
`eldrexdelosreyesbula@gmail.com`

Please include details on:
- Affected package or module.
- Steps to reproduce the issue.
- Potential impact or proof of concept.

We commit to acknowledging your email within 48 hours and providing a target timeline for resolution.
